content: Deep analysis of Tolaram's operations - 30 manufacturing facilities, Multipro's 1,000+ distributor network, SAP S/4HANA rollout status, Lekki Port, and 6 JV entities. Pain points mapped: NGN volatility, diesel dependency, multi-JV data silos, last-mile complexity.

Each use case scored on Business Impact (revenue, cost, risk), Implementation Effort (team, time, complexity), and Data Readiness (SAP availability, quality, gaps). High Impact + High Data Readiness = Phase 1 priority.

Final selection balances quick ROI delivery with long-term capability building. Each use case labelled Tactical (data-ready, near-term) or Strategic (higher effort, 12+ months). Agentic AI is a distinct category for autonomous agent use cases.
Nigeria's largest private port · Opened April 2023
30 manufacturing facilities · 19 distribution centres · 1,000+ exclusive distributors
Portfolio:  Indomie · Power Oil · Kellogg's · Colgate · Dano Milk · Lush Hair · Lucky Fibres · Guinness Nigeria
ENTERPRISE TECHNOLOGY  —  spans entire value chain
ERP · Inventory · Production planning · AR/AP · Plant maintenance
Fleet GPS · OBD-II telematics · Factory sensors · SCADA
SAP Nigeria rollout in progress - Ghana is fully live reference site
Quick wins in 6 months to AI-native in 24 months
Cost reduction · Revenue uplift · Operational efficiency
ARIMA / LSTM + XGBoost - lag sales, seasonality, promo flags, holidays
Approach  Weekly SKU × region forecasts from SAP. Pilot top 50 Multipro SKUs in Lagos before pan-Nigeria rollout.
K-Means clustering + XGBoost churn - RFM metrics, category share, payment history
Approach  Score all 1,000+ Multipro distributors monthly. Flag churn risk 90 days early. Push alerts into Salesforce CRM.
Price elasticity regression + Multi-armed bandit + RL
Approach  A/B test pilot on 3-5 high-volume SKUs. Causal inference separates true lift from forward-buying.
LLM + RAG retrieval - structured prompts, tool-use for SAP & Salesforce
Approach  Field reps ask in natural language: 'Which SKUs underperform in Kano this month?' Secure intranet deployment.
VRP solver + ML travel-time prediction - load, traffic, delivery windows
Approach  Integrate Multipro fleet GPS + delivery data. Run VRP heuristics daily. Pilot Lagos trucks; roll to Ghana.
LSTM / Prophet + Gradient Boosting - lag sales, seasonality, promo, events
Approach  1- 4 week rolling forecasts per SKU × channel. Feed into SAP S/4HANA production planning. Start with top 20 Indomie variants.
Stochastic inventory models - demand variance, lead times, service levels
Approach  Replace fixed safety stock rules with dynamic SKU-level calculations per DC. Stress-test 1,000 demand scenarios. Embed in ERP reorder logic.
Random Forest / XGBoost on telematics - engine hours, fault codes, mileage
Approach  Instrument newer trucks first. Train on maintenance logs + sensor data. Push failure alerts 48-72 hrs pre-breakdown.
Dufil Prima · 30 Facilities · Lagos Free Zone
Context: 30 factories - 25 in Nigeria - on diesel 10+ hrs/day. Every unplanned shutdown = direct revenue loss and JV supply chain disruption.
LSTM + Isolation Forest on IoT streams - vibration, temperature, pressure
Approach  Instrument Dufil Lagos critical assets: extruders, fryers, packaging lines. Real-time anomaly - maintenance ticket 48-72 hrs pre-failure. Integrate into SCADA.
CNN (ResNet / YOLO) on product images - seal integrity, fill weight, labels
Approach  Mount cameras on packaging lines. Transfer learning for limited labelled data. Auto-reject defective units. Edge deployment across Indomie, Dano, Colgate lines.
Regression / Gaussian Process - process setpoints, batch IDs, quality scores
Approach  Collect MES process logs. Model optimal parameter combinations per product run. Surface operator recommendations via live dashboard. Critical for diesel-heavy energy cost reduction.
Group Finance · CFO Office · 6 JV Entities
Agentic AI - Agents that autonomously pull SAP data, run analysis, write commentary and deliver the CFO-ready pack without human intervention per step.
ARIMA / LSTM - AR/AP aging, seasonality, cash flows, receivables
Approach  Feed ERP AR/AP ledgers into weekly rolling forecast. Scenario analysis for large payments. Live dashboard to Group Treasurer and CFO.
OCR + rule-based classifiers + RPA bots for SAP workflow automation
Approach  OCR on invoice PDFs. RPA bots route, match POs, post to SAP S/4HANA. Exception queue for non-standard invoices requiring human review.
Logistic regression / XGBoost - repayment history, velocity, territory
Approach  Score each Multipro distributor monthly for credit adjustment. Auto-approve low-risk. Flag borderline for human review.
Fine-tuned LLM + RAG from SAP financial DB - tool-use, variance calc, NL commentary
Approach  Pulls SAP actuals -> computes variance -> writes commentary -> flags anomalies -> emails CFO-ready pack. Monthly close: 5 days -> 1 day.

Analytics Council (IT + Data + Business) oversees model validation, data quality, and ethical use. MLOps: automated retraining on drift, version control, audit logging. Critical models (credit scoring, pricing) require human review before deployment.
